title: The FDA Just Changed Everything for Peptides 🧬
content:
The FDA just pulled 11 peptides off the do-not-compound list — but REMOVED ≠ APPROVED. 🧬

BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu, MOTS-c, Semax, Epitalon, DSIP, KPV — all removed from Category 2.

But the PCAC hearing isn't until end of July 2026. Your pharmacy still can't compound them legally.

Don't fall for the clickbait. Watch the full breakdown on our channel. (Link in bio) 👇

#peptides #bpc157 #tb500 #fda #biohacking #menshealth #over40 #testosterone #ghk #peptidetherapy #keystoneprotocols
